## What does this PR do?
<!-- One line: which MCP server you added / what you fixed. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] **One entry per PR** (keeps review fast)
- [ ] `id` is unique and lowercase (letters/digits/dashes)
- [ ] `cat`, `tier`, `badge` and `tr` use allowed values (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] `tier` is honest — `free` / `freemium` / `paid`; `badge` is honest — `official` / `community` / `reference`
- [ ] `url` resolves; `inst` shows how to run it (npx/uvx/docker/http/sse/docs)
- [ ] `use` is one plain sentence (no marketing copy)
- [ ] Added a `sec` note if the server runs with the user's credentials
- [ ] Ran `node validate.mjs` locally and it passed

<!-- The "Validate contribution" check runs automatically on this PR. -->
